dict.string: Allow location to match Dino's theme to the weather around you and show local support resources.
Dino uses motion to create a gentle parallax effect in the ambient background.
Dino uses the microphone to record your voice journal entries and transcribe them to text.
Dino transcribes your spoken journal entries into text so you can save them as written reflections.
Dino uses the camera so you can capture a photo of your finished month-long mirror of affirmations.
Dino saves your finished mirror photo to your camera roll so you can keep the memory.
dino uses your calendar to find free moments for you to breathe and recharge.
dino uses your calendar to find free moments for you to breathe and recharge.
dino adds a gentle break to your calendar when you want one.
dino reads your sleep to understand how rest affects your emotional patterns — helping predict and prepare for harder days.
